prestazioni: Engine swap to a D16A9 (1.6L SOHC 16V, 130 PS) with a custom billet crankshaft from Toda Racing, forged pistons by JE (8.5:1 compression), and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM reliability. Pair with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power, featuring a 2.5-inch center section with a straight-pipe design and a 3-inch rear muffler by Blitz Nur Spec R.

Custom ECU remapping via Hondata S300 (v3) with a standalone wiring harness by Rywire, optimized for E85 fuel (85% ethanol blend) with a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Skunk2. Ignition system upgraded to NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (BKR6EIX) with a MSD 6AL ignition box and Moroso 8.5mm silicone spark plug wires.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Honda-specific valving, 8kg/mm front springs, 6kg/mm rear springs) paired with Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set, part #9.5101G) and a Whiteline front sway bar (22mm, adjustable). Braking system upgraded to DBA 4000 Series rotors (ventilated, slotted) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge.
estetica: J's Racing 3-piece widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, riveted and bonded for a seamless fit. Front lip and rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune 03 (modified to fit the Concerto's chassis) with a custom ducktail spoiler by Mugen (originally designed for the 5th-gen Civic but adapted for the Concerto).

OEM+ JDM-spec lighting: Cibie Oscar MX1000 headlights (H4 conversion, 100W bulbs) with custom HID projectors by Morimoto Mini D2S, and rear combination lights from the Honda Integra DC2 (clear lenses, smoked reflectors) with LED bulbs by Philips Ultinon Pro9000. Side markers replaced with smoked LED units by Depo Racing (part #335-1119L-AS).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Bride Zeta III seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) mounted on custom floor mounts by Buddy Club. Steering wheel replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) and quick-release hub by NRG Innovations. Dashboard modified with a digital gauge cluster by Defi Advance BF (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and a custom carbon fiber center console by AutoPower Japan, housing a Pioneer AVH-Z5000DAB head unit with a 10-inch motorized screen.
